message:
fix(core): harden routing and middleware against traversal, CORS, and injection (bd-uz2s)

Routing:
- Reject path traversal segments (.. and .) in Str and Path converters
- Add inline traversal check in Path converter's match_path (bypassed matches())
- Reject NaN/inf/-inf in Float converter (only finite values)

CORS:
- Empty allowed_headers no longer reflects request headers (was equivalent
  to allowing all headers — security risk)
- Wildcard "*" in allowed_headers properly returns "*" or reflects request
  headers when credentials are enabled (per Fetch spec)

Middleware:
- Request ID counter no longer masks to 16 bits (was wrapping at 65536)
- CSRF error response uses serde_json instead of format!() interpolation
  to prevent JSON injection via header_name/error_message

Regression tests added for all fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
